description: A journalist has emailed with questions for a story about the company. A PR manager needs to coordinate a response.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge receipt of the journalist's email and inform them you are working on a response.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a prompt and professional initial reply.

nodes.task_description: Share the journalist's questions with the relevant internal subject matter experts to get accurate answers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent routes the questions to the correct people within the company.

nodes.task_description: Consolidate the answers into a single, approved statement and send it to the journalist before their deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a complete and approved response to the press.
